root.sql:
select sum(tab.row_memno)over( partition by (receipt_date) order by tab.receipt_date ,tab.branch_id ,tab.money_type_id ,tab.receipt_no ,tab.sort_group_item ,tab.loan_type) as rowno, tab.* from ( SELECT decode(lag(sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no,1,null)over( partition by (sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date) order by sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date ,sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ,( case group_item when 'SHR' then 1 when 'LON' then 5 else 99 end ) , decode( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item , 'LON' , FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type ) , sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type ) ) ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no,0,1) as row_memno ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date) as receipt_date_th ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no as receipt_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no as membership_no ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as membername ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status as receipt_status ,( case group_item when 'SHR' then 1 when 'LON' then 5 else 99 end ) as sort_group_item ,sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item as group_item
,case when sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' then sc_com_m_receipt_item.description|| ( select ' (*)' from sc_lon_m_loan_card where loan_contract_no = trim( sc_com_m_receipt_item.description ) and loan_code <> '0' ) when sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'ISP' then sc_com_m_receipt_item.description else sc_com_m_receipt_item.description end as description
,sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id as entry_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id as money_type_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name as money_type_name
,sc_com_m_branch.branch_id as branch_id ,sc_com_m_branch.branch_name as branch_name
,decode( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status , '0' , sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount , 0 ) as principal_amount ,decode( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status , '0' , sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount , 0 ) as interest_amount ,decode( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status , '0' , sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount , 0 ) as item_amount ,sc_com_m_receipt.ppm_status as ppm_status ,sc_com_m_receipt.keep_monthly as keep_monthly , decode( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item , 'LON' , FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type ) , sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type ) as loan_type ,( select sum( item_amount ) from sc_com_m_receipt_item where receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) as sum_rec ,sc_com_m_receipt_item.balance ,sc_com_m_receipt.cancel_date ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_com_m_receipt.cancel_date) as tdate_cancel_date ,sc_com_m_receipt.cancel_id ,nvl(sc_com_m_receipt.money_trans_return,0) as money_trans_return
, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type, sc_com_m_branch , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,si_security_user WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ) and ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id ) and ( ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) ) and si_security_user.user_id = sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id not in ('TBK') /*WHERE*/ )tab
